items.name_en: Chane1⚛️23b New Hippie Hobo AS4339💕Calfskin material, yet full of exquisite luxury~ The pure black body exudes a mysterious charm. The unique hobo style shows a mix of casual and high-end
items.name_cn:
Chane1⚛️23b New Hippie Hobo AS4339💕Calfskin material, yet full of exquisite luxury~ The pure black body exudes a mysterious charm. The unique hobo style shows a mix of casual and high-end
Mini pocket embellishment on the body, brightening the overall look. The double C clasp shines against the black background, highlighting quality and beauty. The short shoulder strap design adds convenience and comfort~ Carry it with you~ You will find the freedom and elegance of life. The beauty revealed inadvertently, the taste flowing in the details, are all unique to you ❇️Dimensions: 37×29.5×13cm

items.name_en: 🌸❄️Chanel Gabrielle Chanel's innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, this Chanel Gabrielle Travel Bag was born 💯. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its presence has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. Delicate and soft bag body with hard and structured bottom fully embodies Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. size:28cm
